channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Explorer for Philenews, 6–13 May 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
4 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Explorer for Philenews, 6–13 May 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/cypriot_ep_polls/2026-05-13-Explorer.html
